prerequisites: A BambooHR account with permission to generate API keys.
An API key generated from your BambooHR account (a 160-bit hexadecimal value tied to your user).
Your BambooHR account subdomain, which is the part before .bamboohr.com in your login URL (for example, 'mycompany' in https://mycompany.bamboohr.com).

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: BambooHR authenticates with an API key supplied via the connector's required api_key field. BambooHR uses the key as the username in HTTP Basic authentication, with any random string accepted as the password (for example, curl -u "{API Key}:x"). The key is a per-user 160-bit hexadecimal value, and a user may hold multiple keys.

setupSteps.title: Generate a BambooHR API key
setupSteps.body: Log in to BambooHR and click your name to open the user context menu. If you have sufficient permissions, select the 'API Keys' option and generate a new key. Copy the key; it is a 160-bit hexadecimal value tied to your user account.

setupSteps.title: Find your account subdomain
setupSteps.body: Look at your BambooHR login URL. The subdomain is the part before .bamboohr.com. For example, if you sign in at https://mycompany.bamboohr.com, your subdomain is 'mycompany'. You will enter this in the required 'subdomain' field, where BambooHR uses it as the {companyDomain} in the API base URL https://{companyDomain}.bamboohr.com/api/.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials and configure the source
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated key in the required 'api_key' field and your subdomain in the required 'subdomain' field. Optionally set 'start_date' to control the start period for TimeOff Requests data (defaults to roughly 30 days before today). To customize report output, set 'custom_reports_fields' to a comma-separated list of fields (for example, firstName,lastName) and toggle 'custom_reports_include_default_fields' to control whether BambooHR's default fields are also returned. Use 'employee_fields' to specify additional employee data fields to retrieve.
